scenarios.name: Gate C Ingress Convergence
scenarios.description: Gate C queues are projected to overflow, threatening corridor flow constraints.

scenarios.name: Transit Hub Surge Burst
scenarios.description: Transit Hub arrival rate rises due to a delayed train, causing surge flows.

scenarios.name: Lift D2 Concourse Outage
scenarios.description: Access lift D2 fails. Mobility-assistance guests require alternate pathways.
